description_long: This is a maroon athletic sneaker with a low-cut profile and a streamlined silhouette, featuring a textured mesh upper for breathability and flexibility. The shoe has a black swoosh logo on the side, and the heel area is reinforced with a molded section for added support. The lacing system is traditional, with matching maroon laces threaded through eyelets that run up the tongue. The midsole and outsole are predominantly black, with visible air cushioning elements and sculpted details for shock absorption and traction. The interior appears padded for comfort, and the overall construction suggests a blend of synthetic and textile materials. The shoe is designed for urban environments, offering both style and functionality for everyday wear.
description: A maroon athletic sneaker with a black swoosh logo, textured mesh upper, and black cushioned sole, designed for comfort and urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the maroon mesh upper, black swoosh logo, and sculpted black sole.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the molded heel support and embossed branding on the heel.
description_view_2: Front-side view displaying the lacing system, toe box texture, and overall streamlined shape.
description_view_3: Frontal view focusing on the laces, tongue, and detailed mesh pattern on the toe box.
attribute_logo: Black swoosh on the side, embossed branding on the heel
